steps.title: Set up the total weight inequality
steps.content:
The person weighs 180 pounds. The freight elevator will carry x boxes at 24 pounds each and y boxes at 55 pounds each. The total weight is
$$180 + 24x + 55y$$
Since the maximum capacity is 5,620 pounds, the total weight must not exceed this limit:
$$180 + 24x + 55y \le 5,620$$

steps.title: Simplify to find the answer
steps.content:
Subtract 180 from both sides:
$$24x + 55y \le 5,620 - 180$$
$$24x + 55y \le 5,440$$
That matches Choice D — $24x + 55y \le 5,440$.
